name: BrushFit AgentStore
description: Digital product store accepting payments from AI agents via x402 protocol and humans via Stripe. Sells BrushFit: The 2-Minute Toothbrush Workout Guide.

payment_protocols.name: x402
payment_protocols.description: HTTP 402 payment protocol with USDC on Base

payment_protocols.name: stripe
payment_protocols.description: Traditional card payment via Stripe checkout

agent_quickstart: To purchase: import { wrapFetchWithPayment } from '@x402/fetch'; const pay = wrapFetchWithPayment(fetch, walletClient); const res = await pay('https://agentstore.vercel.app/api/x402/purchase'); const pdf = await res.blob();
